dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 2617 RH: Say No to Indoctrination Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Owens (for himself and Mr. McGuire) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce
Additional sponsors: Mr. Yakym, Mr. Steube, and Mr. Finstad
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on April 3, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 to prevent the use of funds under such Act to teach or advance concepts related to gender ideology, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Say No to Indoctrination Act.

section.header: Prohibiting use of ESEA funds to teach gender ideology
section.text: Section 8526 of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 7906) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating paragraph (7) as paragraph (8); and
by inserting after paragraph (6) the following:

to teach or advance concepts related to gender ideology, as defined in section 2 of Executive Order 14168 (90 Fed. Reg. 8615; relating to defending women from gender ideology extremism and restoring biological truth to the Federal Government); or

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
